properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God is so good, God is so good, God is so good, He's so good to me. (2x)

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He saved my sin-sick soul, He set my spirit free, He healed my broken heart, He's so good to me. (2x)

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I love Him so, I love Him so, I love Him so, He's so good to me. (2x)

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He answers prayer, He answers prayer, He answers prayer, He's so good to me. (2x)

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: He's coming soon, He's coming soon, He's coming soon, He's so good to me. (2x)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Oh, God is good, Oh, God is good, Oh, God is good, He's so good to me. (2x)

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Jesus is real (Hallelujah!) Jesus is real He's so real to me. (2x)

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: I praise His name, (Hallelujah!) I praise His name, He's so good to me. (2x)
